titleFr: Fournir de l’information sur un événement ou une habitude passés
titleEn: To give information about past events and habits

conceptExplanation.en: OF13 — To give information about past events and habits. Source document SC102-2/13-2005F. Grammar taught: passe_compose, imparfait, agreement. Vocabulary: the OF13 section of the PFL2 Lexique. 60 questions, all traceable to the PFL2 source (3 verbatim source activities + 57 from the OF13 Lexique).
